site.name: The Music Repository
footer.tagline: A growing library of public-domain lessons, songs, and interactive tools for piano and guitar.
footer.licenseNote: All content is public-domain or openly licensed (CC BY-SA). Attribution and license appear on every item.
footer.madeWith: Made for the love of music.
theme.label: Theme
home.title: The Music Repository
home.tagline: Learn music from a growing library of lessons, songs, and interactive tools.
home.pageTitle: The Music Repository — learn piano & guitar
home.heroTitle: A living library for learning music.
home.heroSubtitle: Public-domain scores, lessons, and songs — paired with dozens of interactive practice tools, right in your browser.
home.wayCatalogueDesc: Public-domain repertoire and lessons for piano and guitar — searchable by genre, instrument, and skill.
home.wayToolsDesc: Metronome, tuner, fretboard, circle of fifths, ear trainers and dozens more — no install required.
home.wayCollectionsDesc: Curated courses and song lists that carry you from fundamentals to fluency.
home.premiumDesc: Go Premium for advanced scores, pro lessons, and more depth across the catalogue.
home.featuredEmpty: Featured items will appear here once the catalogue is seeded.
signin.title: Sign in — The Music Repository
signin.heading: Sign in
signin.subtitle: Access the admin CMS and personalized features.
catalogue.title: Catalogue
catalogue.subtitle: Browse teaching materials and songs — filter by type, genre, instrument, and topic.
catalogue.emptyDesc: Try removing a filter or searching for something else.
score.playgroundHint: Type alphaTex (alphaTab's music notation format) or upload a MusicXML / alphaTex file, then render.
score.importPasteHint: Paste MusicXML below and render it with alphaTab.
score.loopHint: Click and drag across the score to select a passage — Play then plays just that passage. Right-click the score for loop options.
score.loopHintEnd: Release to select this section, then press Loop to repeat it.
content.notFound: This content could not be found.
content.lockedMsgPremium: Subscribe to unlock the full score, recording, and lesson for this and every premium item.
content.lockedMsgTier: This item needs a {tier} plan. Redeem a matching code or subscribe to unlock it.
collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Courses, learning paths, and syllabi built from the catalogue.
collections.notFound: This collection could not be found.
collections.savedSubtitle: Collections you've saved and collections you've built.
collections.savedEmpty: You haven't saved any collections yet.
collections.myEmpty: You haven't created any collections yet.
ucoll.name: Name
ucoll.searchItems: Search the catalogue to add pieces…
ucoll.noItems: No pieces yet — search above to add some.
ucoll.confirmDelete: Delete this collection? This cannot be undone.
upgrade.title: Premium
upgrade.subtitle: Unlock premium scores, recordings, and lessons.
upgrade.staffMsg: You have full access as a staff member (editor/admin).
upgrade.activeMsg: You can access all premium scores, recordings, and lessons.
upgrade.lockedMsg: Premium content is locked. Subscribe to unlock every premium item.
upgrade.benefit1: Full scores & PDF downloads for premium repertoire
upgrade.benefit2: Premium recordings and play-along backing tracks
upgrade.note: Checkout runs through a payment provider (Stripe). Until API keys are provisioned this uses a mock checkout — no card, no charge — but the full flow (checkout → provider webhook → entitlement grant) is exercised end-to-end.
checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Complete your subscription.
checkout.priceLine: {price} / month · test mode, no card required
checkout.webhookNote: Clicking Pay simulates the provider firing its checkout.session.completed webhook to the API, which grants your premium entitlement — then returns you to the app.
admin.helpSubtitle: Context help shown by the Info View.
drills.subtitle: Spaced-repetition practice — review a little each day to remember more.
classrooms.subtitle: Create a class, share the join code, and grant premium to your students.
tools.title: Interactive tools
tools.subtitle: Play, explore, and hear music theory in the browser.
tool.keyboard.title: Interactive keyboard
tool.keyboard.summary: Click keys to hear them; highlight any scale.
tool.fretboard.title: Guitar fretboard
tool.fretboard.summary: Standard-tuning fretboard; hear notes and see scale shapes.
tool.circle-of-fifths.title: Circle of fifths
tool.circle-of-fifths.summary: Explore keys, signatures, and diatonic chords.
tool.scale-explorer.title: Scale explorer
tool.scale-explorer.summary: See any scale’s notes, degrees, and step pattern; play it.
tool.chords.title: Chord builder
tool.chords.summary: Build any chord; see its notes and hear it.
tool.chord-identifier.title: Chord identifier
tool.chord-identifier.summary: Pick notes to name the chord (reverse lookup).
tool.modes.title: Mode explorer
tool.modes.summary: The seven modes, brightest to darkest, with their colour notes.
tool.progression.title: Progression builder
tool.progression.summary: Build a chord progression and see its Roman numerals.
tool.metronome.title: Metronome
tool.metronome.summary: Keep time with an accented, adjustable click.
tool.tuner.title: Tuning reference
tool.tuner.summary: Reference tones (A440 + guitar strings) to tune by ear.
tool.intervals.title: Interval explorer
tool.intervals.summary: Hear and name any interval, melodic or harmonic.
tool.staff.title: Staff note reader
tool.staff.summary: Read notes on the treble staff; click to hear them.
tool.ear-trainer.title: Interval ear trainer
tool.ear-trainer.summary: Train your ear: listen and name the interval.
tool.sequencer.title: Beat sequencer
tool.sequencer.summary: Program a drum pattern and loop it.
tool.sight-reading.title: Sight-reading
tool.sight-reading.summary: Read a generated melody on the staff, then check yourself.
tool.backing-track.title: Backing track
tool.backing-track.summary: Loop a chord progression with drums and bass to jam over.
tool.voicings.title: Voicing library
tool.voicings.summary: See a chord’s inversions, drop-2/3, and shell voicings on the keyboard.
tool.player.title: Notation player
tool.player.summary: Play a melody on the staff with a moving cursor; slow, loop, and section it.
tool.licks.title: Lick library
tool.licks.summary: Guitar licks and turnarounds in tab — hear them and work them up to speed.
tool.chord-diagrams.title: Chord diagrams
tool.chord-diagrams.summary: Common open and barre guitar chord shapes — click to strum.
tool.strumming.title: Strumming trainer
tool.strumming.summary: Loop a strum pattern over a chord and play along.
tool.fingerpicking.title: Fingerpicking trainer
tool.fingerpicking.summary: Loop a picking pattern over a chord and follow the strings.
tool.arpeggio.title: Arpeggio player
tool.arpeggio.summary: Arpeggiate any chord up, down, or both — and loop it.
tool.progression-player.title: Progression play-along
tool.progression-player.summary: Strum through a chord progression, one bar per chord.
tool.rhythm.title: Rhythm trainer
tool.rhythm.summary: Read a rhythm and clap along over a steady click.
tool.caged.title: CAGED explorer
tool.caged.summary: One chord in five shapes up the neck.
tool.scale-boxes.title: Scale positions
tool.scale-boxes.summary: See any scale as a movable box on the fretboard.
tool.song.title: Song player
tool.song.summary: Melody and chords together — play along.
tool.progression-ear.title: Progression ear training
tool.progression-ear.summary: Hear a chord progression and name it.
tool.chord-quality-ear.title: Chord ear training
tool.chord-quality-ear.summary: Hear a chord and name its quality.
tool.fret-quiz.title: Fretboard quiz
tool.fret-quiz.summary: Name the highlighted note on the guitar neck.
tool.musicxml.title: MusicXML import
tool.musicxml.summary: Load a MusicXML score, render it, and play it back.
tool.multi-voice.title: Chord engraving
tool.multi-voice.summary: Diatonic triads as stacked chords on the staff.
tool.practice-player.title: Practice player
tool.practice-player.summary: Slow a track down (pitch-preserving) and loop a section.
tool.analyzer.title: Chord analyzer
tool.analyzer.summary: Roman numerals and harmonic function for any progression.
tool.transposer.title: Transposer & capo
tool.transposer.summary: Transpose a progression and find easy capo positions.
tool.bassline.title: Bass-line generator
tool.bassline.summary: Roots, root–fifth, or a walking bass under a progression.
tool.melodic-dictation.title: Melodic dictation
tool.melodic-dictation.summary: Hear a melody, then rebuild it by ear.
tool.rhythm-dictation.title: Rhythm dictation
tool.rhythm-dictation.summary: Hear a one-bar rhythm, then rebuild it.
tool.grooves.title: Groove library
tool.grooves.summary: Classic drum grooves to play along to.
tool.solfege.title: Sight-singing
tool.solfege.summary: Sing with movable-do solfège or scale degrees.
tool.key-quiz.title: Key signature quiz
tool.key-quiz.summary: Name the major key from its signature.
tool.interval-quiz.title: Interval construction
tool.interval-quiz.summary: Build the interval above a given note.
tool.practice-room.title: Practice room
tool.practice-room.summary: Jam over a looping band with the chord shapes shown.
tool.score.title: Score rendering
tool.score.summary: Write alphaTex or import MusicXML, then render + play with alphaTab.
tool.soundfont.title: Sampled instruments
tool.soundfont.summary: Play a keyboard with real General-MIDI instrument samples.
tool.improvise.title: Improvise guide
tool.improvise.summary: Pick a chord and see which scales fit — safe choices for a solo.
tool.progression-generator.title: Progression generator
tool.progression-generator.summary: Common chord progressions by style, in any key.
tool.fret-game.title: Fretboard note game
tool.fret-game.summary: A 60-second sprint: find the named note on the neck.
tool.scale-map.title: Piano & guitar map
tool.scale-map.summary: See a scale or chord lit on the keyboard and the neck at once.
tool.staff-game.title: Note reading game
tool.staff-game.summary: A 60-second sprint: name the note on the staff (treble or bass).
myfav.emptyDesc: Browse the catalogue and tap the heart on anything you want to save.
invite.invalid: This invitation is invalid or already used.
review.nothingDue: Nothing to review right now — come back later, or
acl.empty: No content yet. Create the first item.
colform.title: Title
colform.outcomesHelp:
Play ten pieces from memory
Read simple staves
colform.itemsHelp: Items — content slugs, one per line (order matters)
colform.ungroupedHelp: Ungrouped items — content slugs, one per line (shown before sections)
colform.sectionItemsHelp: content-slug | optional curator note (one per line)
classmgr.noMembers: No members yet — share the join code.
classmgr.createDescription: You become the teacher and get a join code.
classmgr.joinDescription: Enter the code your teacher gave you.
classmgr.noClassrooms: You're not in any classrooms yet — create one or join with a code.
cform.title: Title
